plugins.name: Stratafy Guardian
plugins.description: Guardian of your strategy. Watches over structural health, content quality, execution alignment, and strategic coherence — surfacing what needs attention before it becomes a problem.

plugins.name: Stratafy Expert - Finance Director
plugins.description: Your fractional Finance Director — connects every dollar to strategic intent. Chart of accounts design, financial alignment, budget mapping, pricing models, metrics analysis, and investor prep.

plugins.name: Stratafy Team
plugins.description: Your AI execution partner — connects daily work to company strategy. Daily rhythm, weekly briefings, strategic context, role-adapted coaching, and presentation craft for every team member.

plugins.name: Stratafy Expert - Chief of Staff
plugins.description: Your fractional Chief of Staff — cross-functional alignment, executive reporting, initiative tracking, decision facilitation, and operational rhythm for leadership teams.

plugins.name: Stratafy Expert - CMO
plugins.description: Your fractional CMO — brand audits, campaign briefs, positioning analysis, and marketing-strategy alignment for marketing leaders.

plugins.name: Stratafy Expert - CRO
plugins.description: Your fractional CRO — pipeline reviews, deal strategy, revenue alignment, and go-to-market execution for revenue leaders.

plugins.name: Stratafy Expert - CPO
plugins.description: Your fractional CPO — roadmap reviews, feature briefs, product-strategy alignment, and prioritisation for product leaders.

plugins.name: Stratafy Expert - CTO
plugins.description: Your fractional CTO — connects technology decisions to strategic intent. Technical architecture reviews, build-vs-buy analysis, and engineering decisions that serve the mission.

plugins.name: Stratafy Expert - CHRO
plugins.description: Your fractional CHRO — team health checks, hiring briefs, org-strategy alignment, and people analytics for people leaders.

plugins.name: Stratafy Expert - General Counsel
plugins.description: Your fractional General Counsel — risk reviews, compliance briefs, regulatory alignment, and governance oversight for legal and compliance teams.

plugins.name: Stratafy Expert - Advisor
plugins.description: Your fractional startup advisor — advisory sessions, board prep, stage-specific pattern recognition, and strategic guidance from an experienced external perspective.
